'''Kalend Thora''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

Thora started off as a weapons smuggler working for [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]] gunrunners. She later spent most of her time in [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] where she became renowned for her ability to escape capture. She was later assigned to the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] where she started working for [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]].

Notable features about Thora were a long scar across her head and her tendency to wear the same flight suit as [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

She began using a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[D9 Runner light freighter]] called the ''[[Starknife]]'', when the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] original owner, a fellow member of Black Sun, was ambushed and killed by an unknown party.
